expectations.text: The decision says `prd_file` is official source of truth and `progress_file` is supplemental.
expectations.evidence:
Source of truth: `prd_file` (`/home/adam/dev/personal/skills/skills/prd-build-loop-review/evals/files/startup-fixture/prd.json`) official; `progress_file` supplemental resume data only.
Resolved `progress_file`: `/home/adam/dev/personal/skills/skills/prd-build-loop-review/evals/files/startup-fixture/progress.txt`.
Selected story: `story-auth-timeout` (highest-priority `passes: false` story).
Before story-specific repo discovery: invoke `subagent-model-router`; read only `prd_file`, `progress_file`, and nearby `AGENTS.md` needed to dispatch work; then dispatch fresh `implementer` without first reading story-specific repo files, tests, code, or behavior.
